subcodes.first_line: O Samandar! Be thou not grieved at anything, for grief is condemned, save for thy sorrow on the Day of God, and naught else save in His path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمندر لاتحزن من شیء ان الحزن مذموم الا بحزنی یوم یوم الله و غیر او در او
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort
